scripts.build:artifact: npm run clean:artifact && mkdir -p .artifact && tar --exclude='.artifact' --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='.env' --exclude='data/drills.json' -cf - . | tar -xf - -C .artifact && cp -R ../common .artifact/common && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='.artifact/package.json';const pl='.artifact/package-lock.json';const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));if(pkg.dependencies&&pkg.dependencies['emergency-drill-manager-common']==='file:../common'){pkg.dependencies['emergency-drill-manager-common']='file:./common';}fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(pkg,null,2)+'\n');if(fs.existsSync(pl)){const raw=fs.readFileSync(pl,'utf8').replaceAll('file:../common','file:./common');fs.writeFileSync(pl,raw);}"
